---
title: ""
page-layout: full
---
::: {.project-header}
::: {.container}
[← Back to Research](../research.qmd){.back-link}
# Private-Sector Strategy for the Health Forecasting Alliance
::: {.project-meta}
<span><strong>Type:</strong> UCSD GPS Capstone</span>
<span><strong>Client:</strong> VitalWave / Brooke Partridge</span>
<span><strong>Term:</strong> Spring 2026</span>
:::
:::
:::
::: {.container style="max-width: 860px; margin: 0 auto; padding-bottom: 5rem;"}

## Overview

Full write-up coming soon. Stakeholder interviews with VitalWave CTO, CDC Forecasting Analytics lead, and HFA Engagement Manager synthesized into a five forces heatmap and value chain map identifying pharma, development finance, and tech/AI as priority private-sector targets for HFA's partnership strategy.

:::
